Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null},{"id":5987216361,"node_id":"LA_kwDOAA3dP88AAAABZN2r6Q","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/sprintable%20-%20C","name":"sprintable - C","color":"5319E7","default":false,"description":""}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":2,"created_at":"2024-11-18T13:47:08Z","updated_at":"2024-11-21T16:08:02Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"MEMBER","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"This consistently segfaults:

```pycon
>>> import numpy as np
>>> np.timedelta64(1, "s").__divmod__(np.timedelta64(1, "Y"))  # same with "M"
```

```
[1]    26438 segmentation fault (core dumped)  python
```

This also happens when there's a `m8[Y]` or `m8[M]` scalar involved, `"ns"` is used instead of `"s"`, the RHS and LHS are flipped, or when `__rdivmod__` is used.

---

```pycon
>>> import sys
>>> import numpy as np
>>> sys.version
'3.12.7 (main, Oct  3 2024, 03:57:55) [GCC 11.4.0]'
>>> np.__version__
'2.1.3'
>>> np.show_runtime()
[{'numpy_version': '2.1.3',
  'python': '3.12.7 (main, Oct  3 2024, 03:57:55) [GCC 11.4.0]',
  'uname': uname_result(system='Linux', node='pop-os', release='6.9.3-76060903-generic', version='#202405300957~1726766035~22.04~4092a0e SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Thu S', machine='x86_64')},
 {'simd_extensions': {'baseline': ['SSE', 'SSE2', 'SSE3'],
                      'found': ['SSSE3',
                                'SSE41',
                                'POPCNT',
                                'SSE42',
                                'AVX',
                                'F16C',
                                'FMA3',
                                'AVX2'],
                      'not_found': ['AVX512F',
                                    'AVX512CD',
                                    'AVX512_KNL',
                                    'AVX512_KNM',
                                    'AVX512_SKX',
                                    'AVX512_CLX',
                                    'AVX512_CNL',
                                    'AVX512_ICL']}},
 {'architecture': 'Haswell',
  'filepath': '/home/joren/.pyenv/versions/3.12.7/lib/python3.12/site-packages/numpy.libs/libscipy_openblas64_-ff651d7f.so',
  'internal_api': 'openblas',
  'num_threads': 32,
  'prefix': 'libscipy_openblas',
  'threading_layer': 'pthreads',
  'user_api': 'blas',
  'version': '0.3.27'}]
```
